mapper.sql: id, author_id, author_name, content, images, tags, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, avg_score, score_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE ideas SET content = #{content}, images = #{images}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, view_count = #{viewCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, avg_score = #{avgScore}, score_count = #{scoreCount}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ideas ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM ideas ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM ideas WHERE author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM ideas WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ideas WHERE author_id = #{authorId}
